distributor delayed: Number of test programs delayed due to VM avoidance
distributor undelayed: Number of test programs undelayed for VM avoidance
distributor violated: Number of test programs violated VM avoidance
exec gen: Executions of generated programs
exec fuzz: Executions of mutated programs
exec candidate: Executions of candidate programs
exec triage: Executions of corpus triage programs
minimize: call: Total number of remove call attempts during minimization
minimize: props: Total number of remove properties attempts during minimization
minimize: pointer: Total number of pointer minimization attempts
minimize: array: Total number of array minimization attempts
